german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Predominantly Unnecessary
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but with a notable share of unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Customer-facing PMs, indicating potential constraints in role accessibility.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 58% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote or hybrid options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All job opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with no remote or unclear options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Key Roles
ai.subtitle: Only 26% of positions prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
